commands.review_summary:
The PR imports `maybeRecoverSuspiciousConfigRead` and calls a new helper from the normal, plugin-metadata, and write-prep config snapshot read wrappers in `src/config/io.ts`.

PR surface: Source +38. Total +38 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: PR head calls recovery after `readConfigFileSnapshotInternal()`, while current main observes the suspicious snapshot during internal finalization and the recovery helper skips an already-observed signature. I did not run a live gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs a contributor or maintainer code-path correction plus after-fix real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not repair-marker this branch while contributor setup proof is still missing.
